svg.title: Case-level quality deltas
svg.desc: Signed pass/pass judge score deltas for high-signal 50-case eval rows.
svg.text: Each cell is left-side score minus baseline score after both hard gates pass; blanks are excluded, not zero.
Scope: 50-case saved hard-gate and quality snapshot; all-model reference rows included.
Source: selected 50-case saved quality pair reports.
